mapper.sql: select vehicle_id, vin, vehicle_model, factory_code, factory_name, material_no, upload_status, validation_result, status, country, color, secondary_color, certificate_version, wvta_no, issue_date, json, xml_template_id, vehicle_template_id, deleted, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark, sdd.dict_label as vehicleModelStr, vt.filepath as vehicleTemplateFilepath, vt.coc_template_no as coc_template_no from vehicle_info vi left join (select dict_code, dict_label from sys_dict_data where dict_type = 'vehicle_model') sdd on vi.vehicle_model = sdd.dict_code left join (select template_id, filepath, coc_template_no from vehicle_template) vt on vi.vehicle_template_id = vt.template_id
mapper.select:
AND vin like concat('%', #{vin}, '%')
AND vehicle_model = #{vehicleModel}
AND factory_code like concat('%', #{factoryCode}, '%')
AND factory_name like concat('%', #{factoryName}, '%')
AND material_no like concat('%', #{materialNo}, '%')
AND color like concat('%', #{color}, '%')
AND secondary_color like concat('%', #{secondaryColor}, '%')
AND country like concat('%', #{country}, '%')
AND date_format(issue_date,'%y%m%d') >= date_format(#{issueDateBeginTime},'%y%m%d')
AND date_format(issue_date,'%y%m%d') <= date_format(#{issueDateEndTime},'%y%m%d')
AND date_format(create_time,'%y%m%d') >= date_format(#{createdBeginTime},'%y%m%d')
AND date_format(create_time,'%y%m%d') <= date_format(#{createdEndTime},'%y%m%d')
AND wvta_no like concat('%', #{wvtaNo}, '%')
AND upload_status = #{uploadStatus}
AND validation_result = #{validationResult}
AND status = #{status}
AND coc_template_no = #{cocTemplateNo}
AND deleted = 2
AND deleted = 0
order by update_time desc
mapper.insert: insert into vehicle_info ( vin, vehicle_model, factory_code, factory_name, material_no, upload_status, validation_result, status, country, color, secondary_color, certificate_version, wvta_no, issue_date, json, xml_template_id, vehicle_template_id, remark, create_by, create_time ) values ( #{vin}, #{vehicleModel}, #{factoryCode}, #{factoryName}, #{materialNo}, #{uploadStatus}, #{validationResult}, #{status}, #{country}, #{color}, #{secondaryColor}, #{certificateVersion}, #{wvtaNo}, #{issueDate}, #{json}, #{xmlTemplateId}, #{vehicleTemplateId}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, sysdate() )
mapper.update:
update vehicle_info set deleted = 2 where vehicle_id in
#{vehicleId}

update vehicle_info set deleted = 0 where vehicle_id in
#{vehicleId}
mapper.delete:
delete from vehicle_info where deleted = 2 and vehicle_id in
#{vehicleId}
delete from vehicle_info where deleted = 2 and vehicle_id = #{vehicleId}
delete from vehicle_info where deleted = 2 and update_time < date_sub(now(), interval 1 month)
mapper.update: UPDATE vehicle_info SET status = #{status}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = SYSDATE() WHERE vehicle_id = #{vehicleId}
